_about: Registry of musings. The site build (utils/python/build_site.py) reads this to discover each musing folder, run its build-musing.py, and render the landing-page cards. Schema + workflow: musing-tech-notes.md.

musings.name: Minimalist Space Logistics
musings.description: A 4X space game stripped to a single trading ship: out-logistic an unwinnable war until the front can win it for you.
